title: Obscura Meridian Co.
tagline: Parent-brand presence supporting multiple ventures under one system.
problem: Multiple creative ventures needed a unified parent brand — one that could house them coherently without flattening their individual identities.
solution: Designed a flagship brand presence with performance-first layout, scalable architecture, and a visual system that works as an umbrella for distinct sub-brands.
result: A stable, extensible foundation that has successfully onboarded new properties without structural rework.
